outcomes.description: Students can get ready for the listening/watching-comprehension process for the current content on "school life with roles, and responsibilities at school; school routines; national days and celebrations" carefully.

Students can bring information about the current content on "school life with roles, and responsibilities at school; school routines; national days and celebrations" together through significant details and main components while listening/watching it.

Students can make meaning of/derive meaning from the current content on "school life with roles, and responsibilities at school; school routines; national days and celebrations" through significant details by listening/watching it carefully.

Students can convey their knowledge, experience, thoughts, and feelings examined carefully about the whole listening/watching-comprehension process in relation to the current content on "school life with roles, and responsibilities at school; school routines; national days and celebrations".

Students can select and use the target grammatical elements of the current content about "school life with roles, and responsibilities at school; school routines; national days and celebrations" accurately, authentically, spontaneously, and naturally and use it appropriately and effectively when communicating with others.

Students can select and use the target phonological elements of the current content about "school life with roles, and responsibilities at school; school routines; national days and celebrations" accurately, authentically, and naturally through spontaneous decision-making processes and use it in an appropriate and effective way when communicating with others.
Students can get ready for the reading-comprehension process about the current content on "school life with roles, and responsibilities at school; school routines; national days and celebrations".

Students can bring information about the current content on "school life with roles, and responsibilities at school; school routines; national days and celebrations" through skimming (looking quickly at) the audio-visual elements and reading the content very quickly.

Students can make meaning of / derive meaning from the current content about "school life with roles, and responsibilities at school; school routines; national days and celebrations" by reading it carefully.

Students can convey their knowledge, experiences, thoughts, and feelings related to the reading-comprehension process about the current content, "school life with roles, and responsibilities at school; school routines; national days and celebrations" in relation to themselves or others, both individually and/or with others.
Students can get ready for speaking-expression process about the current content on "school life with roles, and responsibilities at school; school routines; national days and celebrations".
Students can use the model/example for producing verbal content about the current content on "school life with roles, and responsibilities at school; school routines; national days and celebrations".

Students can organise a new verbal content on "school life with roles, and responsibilities at school; school routines; national days and celebrations" by speaking accurately, efficiently, and authentically.

Students can construct a new verbal content on "school life with roles, and responsibilities at school; school routines; national days and celebrations" by speaking accurately, efficiently, and authentically.

Students can reorganise (reconstruct) and use information about the "school life with roles, and responsibilities at school; school routines; national days and celebrations" to communicate with other people.

Students can convey their knowledge, experiences, thoughts, and feelings related to the speaking-expression process about the current content, "school life with roles, and responsibilities at school; school routines; national days and celebrations" to communicate with other people in relation to themselves or others, both individually and/or with others.

Students can select and use the target vocabulary of the current content about "school life with roles, and responsibilities at school; school routines; national days and celebrations" accurately, authentically, spontaneously, and naturally and use it appropriately and effectively when communicating with others.
Students can get ready for the writing-expression process about the current content on "school life with roles, and responsibilities at school; school routines; national days and celebrations".
Students can understand the model/example for the writing task about the current content on "school life with roles, and responsibilities at school; school routines; national days and celebrations".

Students can organise a content for the assigned writing task on the current content "school life with roles, and responsibilities at school; school routines; national days and celebrations" based on the model/example provided.

Students can individually construct/form content for the assigned writing task on the current content "school life with roles, and responsibilities at school; school routines; national days and celebrations".

Students can reorganise (reconstruct) and use information in the new written tasks about the "school life with roles, and responsibilities at school; school routines; national days and celebrations" to communicate with other people.

Students can reflect on their knowledge, experiences, thoughts, and feelings related to the writing-expression process about the current content, "school life with roles, and responsibilities at school; school routines; national days and celebrations" in relation to themselves or others, both individually and/or with others.
